title: stelis ferrelliae
intro: Stelis ferrelliae, also known as the Butterfly Orchid or Orchidée Papillon, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Stelis ferrelliae include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Stelis ferrelliae typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
